hooks.command:
python3 -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': '── CIA SESSION COMPLETION GATE ─────────────────────────────────

  [1] cia-log.md      -- date heading + files changed + decisions + build progress
  [2] CLAUDE.md       -- frontend arch / env vars / modules / business rules changed?
  [3] BUILD QUEUE     -- CLAUDE.md Frontend Build Queue status updated?
                      -- sub-pages: [ ] not started | [~] in progress | [x] complete
                      -- Build row: [x] only when ALL sub-pages are [x]
                      -- Progress Summary: count + % recalculated?
                      -- Sub-page descriptions updated if feature was enhanced?
  [4] SKILL.md        -- module count / frontend conventions / icon mapping changed?
  [5] Frontend        -- pnpm --filter @cia/back-office typecheck  (must exit 0)
                      -- Tailwind imports use relative paths, not package name
                      -- NairaFallback @font-face present in tokens.css
                      -- DevAuthProvider only behind import.meta.env.DEV
  [6] Figma Sync      -- new/changed screen pushed to Zaiu2K7NvEJ7Cjj6z1xt2D?
                      -- use_figma skill loaded before every use_figma call
                      -- Naira sign: setRangeFontName(i,i+1,Noto Sans) per char
  [7] OpenAPI         -- /partner/v1/ endpoints: @Operation @ApiResponse @Schema
  [8] Postman         -- noted in cia-log.md if endpoint shape changed
  [9] Backend APIs    -- service interfaces + DTOs match business rules

Complete any incomplete items before closing.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────'}))"

python3 -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'CIA PRE-COMPACTION: Updating docs before context is compressed.', 'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreCompact', 'additionalContext': 'MANDATORY BEFORE COMPACTION -- Complete the CIA Session Completion Gate now: (1) Update cia-log.md with ALL changes made this session -- every file created or modified, every decision made. (2) Update CLAUDE.md if any module, architecture, environment variable, or business rule changed. (3) Update SKILL.md if module count, feature count, entities, or conventions changed. (4) Ensure all new /partner/v1/ endpoints in cia-partner-api have @Operation + @ApiResponse + @Schema annotations. (5) Note in cia-log.md if Postman collection regeneration is needed. Complete all of this BEFORE the compaction proceeds.'}}))"
